name: Frontend Design
whatItDoes: Applies premium design rules for typography, colors, layout, and motion. Bans Inter font, pure black, and AI purple. Enforces a curated design system that produces distinctive, high-quality interfaces.
whenToUse: When building any new UI component or page.
exampleUse: Used on DevToolkit to swap Inter for Geist, add emerald accents, and introduce staggered animations across the homepage.
